EXECUTIVE CREDENTIAL RECORD

Lakecia Gunter: AI advisor with operator, board, and platform credibility.

A credentials-forward view for organizations that need proof: 25 years in technology, CTO leadership at Microsoft, CEO-suite execution at Intel, DoD engineering foundations, public-company board service, and a consistent commitment to women leading in AI.

Scope of advisory

AI strategy, governance, leadership coaching, and adoption programs for executives and teams.
